verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 is a single-pass transmembrane protein of the IZUMO family with a documented extracellular immunoglobulin-like domain. It localizes to the plasma membrane, particularly on sperm cells, where it mediates reproductive cell-cell interactions. The protein body is stably anchored to the outer leaflet via its TM domain with a substantial ectodomain accessible to extracellular binders.
